programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Song of the Gringo
programme.desc: Several miners are killed and their mines are confiscated by a mysterious person Tex an undercover cop is asked to investigate the murders However Tex ends up being implicated as a criminal

programme.title: This Man Cant Die
programme.desc: An adventurer vows revenge after he returns home to find his parents murdered and his sister traumatised by the killer

programme.title: Man of the Forest
programme.desc: The kidnapping of an heir to a ranch goes awry when the Man of the Forest mistrusted by the heiress takes matters into his own hands with the help of his pet cougar

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim and Artie must protect a key member of a wealthy investment group whose surviving member stands to inherit the groups sizable assets

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble saves his boss life garnering the ranch owners powerful protection but Kimble doesnt want his favors because the owners a hit-man gone legit With Lt Gerard closing in the wealthy retired assassin sends the detective in the opposite direction from the fugitive into a trap where Gerard will be taken off the hunt for good

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike unwittingly becomes involved in the preparation of an underwater bank robbery

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike battles saboteurs while conducting an underwater security check for a rocket fuel plant

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: An American chaplain loses faith when the woman he loves and more than two dozen young soldiers are killed when 918th base is bombed; three of the Germans responsible are captured but plot to complete their original sabotage mission

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Convinced Barnabas is hiding something sinister in the basement David goes snooping around the old house only to be caught by a distraught Julia

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Barnabas encourages Roger to send David away Sarah gives David a toy soldier for protection

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Determined to prove everyone wrong David decides to sneak into the basement of the old house where Barnabas keeps his coffin

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: David is so adamant there is a coffin in the basement of the old house that Burke and Dr Woodard decide to visit Barnabas and investigate

programme.title: A Man Alone
programme.desc: A gunfighters main hope lies in the trust of a beautiful woman who hides him out when he is wrongly suspected of a stagecoach massacre

programme.title: Fright Night 2
programme.desc: Fright Night Part 2 is a sequel to link=tt0089175] Charley Brewster and the horror host Peter Vincent must face more vampires out for revenge

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddys Nightmares

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A jaded has-been photographer plots the demise of his younger talented protégé when they go on assignment in Central America

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A man murders his beautiful younger wife when she threatens to leave him He then packs her body in a big suitcase and boards a train where he is stalked by an inquisitive detective

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Handsome ambitious greedy Jeff Boder and his wealthy older wife Jackie Winslows cynical stepdaughter Pamela become lovers and conspire to kill Jackie using cursed voodoo-like dolls

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Married sleazy advertising executive and music producer Bob Ames finds gorgeous seductive Cathie Marks hiding in his cabin in the woods during a rainstorm Is she a dream come true or something more sinister and dangerous

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks safe haven in a monastery but the monks there have secrets of their own In the past the werewolf Skorzeny paid a visit to the monastery and turned at least one of the monks

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A woman targetted in a mob hit in Chinatown escapes but in critical condition Now Nick must find her before the mobsters do

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Jack and Ryan become suspicious when they each receive mysterious visits from three friends from their past

programme.title: Mchale 412
programme.desc: Mchale 412

programme.title: Mchales Navy
programme.desc: Ensign Charles Parker - Newly assigned to the 73 Crew as Executive Officer - Is Binghamtons last hope to tame McHale and his pirates Though Parker is unwelcome at first McHale sees potential in the young Officer and orders his Crew to shape up so that Parker wont be shipped out

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: A trouble maker transfers into the platoon and decides to make Pyle his patsy Gomer tries to handle it with understanding and kindness - but soon learns that bullies need to be stood up against

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After being bawled out by Sgt Carter for not working hard enough Gomer decides not accept his pay for that week which causes all sorts of troubles for Sgt Carter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After somebody breaks into the supply hut everyone suspects that a killer may be on the island--except for the Skipper who thinks that it may be part of a voodoo curse

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The Skipper and Mr Howell compete for leadership on the island by being named President When the castaways cast their votes the result is surprising

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: After one full year of marriage Luke and Kate finally get to go on their honeymoon

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Luke McCoy is tricked into buying a swimming pool

programme.title: Smart 502
programme.desc: Smart 502

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Get Smart

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: Captain Grant and Lt Steiger set a match to a powder-keg when they abduct BJs best friend Bear BJ and the lady truckers wage war against SCAT just when Grant is trying to woo appropriations funding from an influential state senator

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans 325
programme.desc: Hogans 325

programme.title: Hogans 318
programme.desc: Hogans 318

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: DArtagnan and his Musketeer comrades thwart the plans of Cardinal Richelieu to usurp King Louis XIIIs power

programme.title: Mozambique 1964
programme.desc: An out-of-work and penniless American pilot is offered work in Mozambique and promptly becomes an unwitting pawn in a world of drug smuggling kidnap and murder

programme.title: The Heroes Of Telemark
programme.desc: Norwegian resistance tries to stop German efforts to produce an atomic bomb component during World War II

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: I Come in Peace
programme.desc: A rebel police officer Jack Caines wants to bring an end to the drug trade and its top supplier Victor Manning Jack teams up with an FBI agent to launch an undercover operation to entrap Victor

programme.title: The Dukes the Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke assist Texas ranger Jude Emery in tracking down hardened criminal Snake Harmon But they must rely on a little help from their friends as well as Boss and Sheriff Byrd when they find themselves kidnapped by Harmons henchmen

programme.title: Hercules 211
programme.desc: Hercules 211

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While a dying colonel implants his brain in a deceased criminal the Taelons show a new electromagnetic pulse weapon Jonathan Doors wishes to acquire it

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The aliens plan to disorganise human society by paralysing its means of communication

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: An attractive reporter arrives unannounced to interview Arcane but she is not what she seems and her hidden agenda threatens both the doctor and the swamp

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp Thing helps Cathy comprehend her late alienated mother by showing her visions of her mothers teen-age life

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A sinister woman called Zamara materializes on the base forcing Helena and Tony to accompany her to the planet of Vega whose natives are anything but friendly A servant of the Vegans known only as Number Eight informs the two Alphans that he and his race are the natural inhabitants of the planet and that Zamara and her race are androids who it turns out want the Alphans to teach them warfare

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: A handsome stranger saves Audras life during a horse stampede and she quickly becomes attached to him unaware of his involvement in a series of robberies in the Valley

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne comes upon a man who has just been shot Arrested by a few riders and on the way to Laramie a hidden benefactor frees him Their new friendship is shaken when he finds the real reason he saved him and who he really is

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A boyish Pied Piper leads teenaged girls into prostitution His gentle manner makes his girls willing victims- and hides the fact that he has also committed murder

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Cinnamon works to stop a munitions magnate who is supplying arms to neo-nazis She reawakens memories of his late wife who was murdered by Hitler

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: Cyber Tracker
programme.desc: This is the future A secret service agent is framed by his own and becomes the target of the seemingly indestructible Cyborg-Executioners

programme.title: Sleepaway Camp
programme.desc: Bunks and showers are a mad stabbers beat at a summer camp strictly for teens

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future a cross country automobile race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians to gain points that are tallied based on each kills brutality
